profile.name: Abdelhamid Ben Brahim
profile.title: Data Engineer | Analytics Engineering | Financial Services
profile.tagline: I build scalable data pipelines and regulatory reporting systems that deliver reliable, high-impact insights.
profile.about: I am a Data / Analytics Engineer specialising in robust, auditable data pipelines for the financial services sector. I take full ownership of complex orchestration and regulatory reporting systems — accelerating data delivery while ensuring total compliance and data integrity.

featuredProjects.label: Performance Engineering
featuredProjects.title: Data Pipeline Optimisation & Performance Engineering
featuredProjects.summary: Optimised a large-scale regulatory data pipeline, significantly reducing processing time and improving reporting delivery across monthly cycles.
impact: Reduced GL processing time from ~1.5 hours → 30 minutes (67% improvement)
Reduced total pipeline runtime from ~2.5 hours → ~1 hour (~60% improvement)
Enabled faster and more reliable regulatory reporting cycles
whatIDid: Identified bottlenecks in data ingestion and transformation layers
Replaced inefficient Pandas-based loading with direct streaming from Parquet into DuckDB
Refactored SQL transformations and optimised query pushdown performance
Improved orchestration flow to reduce idle time and improve execution efficiency

featuredProjects.label: System Ownership
featuredProjects.title: End-to-End Regulatory Reporting Pipeline (COREP/FINREP)
featuredProjects.summary: Owned and maintained a critical regulatory reporting pipeline generating outputs for COREP/FINREP frameworks submitted to regulators.
impact: Enabled automated, auditable reporting outputs for regulatory submission
Reduced manual intervention and improved data reliability across reporting cycles
Supported audit processes with improved traceability and controls
whatIDid: Managed full pipeline ownership — orchestration, transformation, and delivery
Built and maintained dbt models implementing COREP/FINREP reporting logic
Integrated multiple upstream data sources into a single reporting layer
Implemented robust validation and reconciliation checks
Led BAU changes, system improvements, and incident resolution

featuredProjects.label: Rapid Integration
featuredProjects.title: Large-Scale Mortgage Portfolio Integration
featuredProjects.summary: Integrated newly acquired mortgage portfolios into the regulatory reporting pipeline under significantly accelerated timelines.
impact: Delivered full integration in ~6 weeks against a ~3-month standard timeline
Enabled immediate inclusion of new portfolios in regulatory reporting cycles
Established a reusable integration pattern improving scalability for future onboarding
whatIDid: Led end-to-end data mapping and transformation design for new portfolio data
Built dbt models to integrate and normalise new datasets into reporting layer
Implemented validation and reconciliation checks to ensure data integrity
Worked closely with stakeholders to align technical outputs with reporting requirements

featuredProjects.label: Data Completeness
featuredProjects.title: Treasury System Integration
featuredProjects.summary: Integrated treasury data into the central regulatory reporting pipeline to enhance financial reporting completeness and accuracy.
impact: Improved coverage and completeness of financial reporting outputs
Reduced manual adjustments and reconciliation effort across reporting cycles
Ensured data consistency across regulatory and management reporting systems
whatIDid: Designed new data models to accommodate treasury data structures
Implemented transformation logic in dbt to integrate treasury into reporting layer
Added validation controls and data quality checks to ensure accuracy
Collaborated with treasury and business teams to align on requirements

additionalProjects.title: Movie Recommendation System
additionalProjects.summary: A personalised movie recommendation system designed to enhance user experience through predictive modelling and collaborative filtering.
impact: Improved baseline model loss by 36% through iterative model development
Benchmarked SVD, Regression, SVR, and Neural Network models for comparative analysis
whatIDid: Designed and implemented foundational SVD collaborative filtering models
Scaled up to advanced algorithms including Random Forest and PyTorch neural networks
Engineered features from raw datasets following comprehensive exploratory data analysis

additionalProjects.title: IMDb NLP Sentiment Analysis
additionalProjects.summary: An NLP pipeline classifying cinematic reviews into positive and negative sentiments using BigQuery and a custom CNN model.
impact: Achieved 87% predictive accuracy with a custom Convolutional Neural Network
whatIDid: Extracted large datasets using complex Google BigQuery SQL queries
Preprocessed text data using Count Vectorization and tokenisation
Engineered a CNN model to automate sentiment classification at scale

additionalProjects.title: Credit Card Defaults Prediction
additionalProjects.summary: A machine learning model designed to assess default likelihood for credit card holders and mitigate financial risk.
impact: Achieved 82% overall accuracy and 43% recall on proactive default identification
whatIDid: Managed data wrangling, preparation, and handling of classification imbalances
Built an ensemble model using Naive Bayes, Logistic Regression, XGBoost, and SVM
Conducted extensive hyperparameter tuning to maximise recall performance

additionalProjects.title: Revenue Testing & Sampling Automation
additionalProjects.summary: Overhaul of the receivables and revenue testing process for a prominent UK-based property client.
impact: Reduced manual sampling and testing duration from 8 days to 2 days (75% reduction)
Implemented targeted sampling logic for high-risk areas, boosting audit precision
whatIDid: Established a robust, repeatable data model using Power Query
Engineered sophisticated DAX measures for dynamic reporting logic
Built an automated dynamic reporting application, centralising disparate data processes

additionalProjects.title: Azure Trading & Productivity Engineering
additionalProjects.summary: End-to-end data pipeline replacing manual Excel dependency for tracking utilisation and global weekly trading metrics.
impact: Eliminated manual extraction lags, enabling daily dashboard intelligence for partners
Improved visibility across critical KPIs — billings, capacity, and pipeline WIP
whatIDid: Re-engineered legacy requirements into a dimensional star-schema data model
Formulated Azure Data Factory workflows to ingest unstructured operations logs
Enacted automated validation metrics via Python culminating in a Power BI semantic layer

blogPosts.title: How I Reduced a Data Pipeline Runtime by Over 60%
blogPosts.summary: A deep dive into diagnosing and eliminating bottlenecks in a large-scale regulatory data pipeline — replacing Pandas ingestion with direct Parquet-to-DuckDB streaming and applying SQL pushdown optimisation.

blogPosts.title: How I Integrated a Legacy Acquisition Database into a Modern Analytics Platform
blogPosts.summary: A technical deep dive into transforming a fragmented legacy SQL database from an acquired business into a clean star schema powering unified financial and productivity reporting.

blogPosts.title: What Running dbt at Enterprise Scale Actually Looks Like
blogPosts.summary: A technical deep dive into operating dbt in a large-scale regulatory reporting environment with 350+ models, thousands of tests, 12+ source systems, and enterprise-grade data controls.
